1.title: Requests Sum (by Region)
1.query:
timeseries requests_sum_by_region = avg(cloud.aws.cloudfront.requests_sum_by_region),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(requests_sum_by_region) desc
| limit 20

2.title: TotalErrorRate Average (by Region)
2.query:
timeseries total_error_rate_average_by_region = avg(cloud.aws.cloudfront.total_error_rate_average_by_region),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(total_error_rate_average_by_region) desc
| limit 20
